title: Alpha 1.0_13
body:
Adds like 12 entities so far - Working on quite alot of stuff since it was reworked for the billionth time >_>


Entities are from:
T.O.E. (Series on YT by doctor nowhere)
Mark101 (Minecraft ARG)
The Broken Script (Minecraft ARG Horror Mod)
No_Moon.jar (Minecraft Horror Mod)
TSV (Discontinued arg series on X) (returning soon)


~~horror~~ joke mod

version sorting: Alphas = Pre build | Betas = dont recommend downloading (bugged, has a fix or some other reason) | Release = Perfectly fine, go ahead download

---------------------------------------------------------------

Main story is unfinished. Will be making it once i make 2.0
